message:
fix(formulas): add missing review_id variable to mol-idea-to-plan formula

The formula uses {{review_id}} throughout its steps but never declared it
in [vars], causing TestAllEmbeddedFormulas_VariableValidation to fail.

Closes gt-j9tl, gt-x0z9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -414,3 +414,8 @@ required = true
 description = "Additional context: constraints, related code, prior decisions, linked beads"
 required = false
 default = ""
+
+[vars.review_id]
+description = "Short slug for this review, generated by the intake step (e.g. notification-levels)"
+required = false
+default = ""
